name: Existence of Equilibria
description: Learn about Existence of Equilibria and its applications in game-theory.

content.overview: Existence of Equilibria is a fundamental concept in game-theory. {{viz:diagram-01}}
content.explanation:
This topic covers the essential aspects of Existence of Equilibria. Let's start with the basic definition {{viz:formula-01}} and then explore the interactive model {{viz:3d-01}}. 
          
As you can see from the animation {{viz:anim-01}}, the concept behaves in a specific way. The data visualization {{viz:chart-01}} shows real-world applications.

Understanding Existence of Equilibria requires both theoretical knowledge {{viz:text-01}} and practical exploration {{viz:simulation-01}}.
content.whyItMatters: Existence of Equilibria is essential for mastering Sequential Games. The Lottie animation {{viz:lottie-01}} illustrates its importance.
